---
title: "References & Extra Resources"
---

Helpful Reference Materials to Continue your Learning



## Books

[R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz)

[Tidyverse Skills for Data Science](https://jhudatascience.org/tidyversecourse/)

[R Programming for Data Science](https://leanpub.com/rprogramming)

[University of Victoria: DAMS302](https://bookdown.org/martin_monkman/DataAnalyticsCodingFundamentals/)

[R Primers by Andrew Heiss](https://r-primers.andrewheiss.com)

[Tidy Modeling with R](https://www.tmwr.org)

[OSCA with Bioconductor: single cell](https://bioconductor.org/books/release/OSCA/)

[OSTA with Bioconductor: spatial](https://bioconductor.org/books/release/OSTA/)

[The Art of Data Science](https://leanpub.com/artofdatascience)

[Exploratory Data Analysis with R](https://leanpub.com/exdata)

## Online Courses

#### Software Carpentry & Data Carpentry Courses

[Programming with R](https://swcarpentry.github.io/r-novice-inflammation/)

[R for Reproducible Scientific Analysis](https://swcarpentry.github.io/r-novice-gapminder/instructor/index.html)

[Introduction to data analysis with R and Bioconductor](https://carpentries-incubator.github.io/bioc-intro/)

[RNA-seq analysis with Bioconductor](https://carpentries-incubator.github.io/bioc-rnaseq/)

[Data Analysis adn Visualization with R for Genomics](https://datacarpentry.github.io/genomics-r-intro/)

#### Data Science in a Box

[Course Content](https://datasciencebox.org/content)

[NIGMS Sandbox GitHub](https://github.com/NIGMS/NIGMS-Sandbox)

## Oklahoma Resources

[Oklahoma Data Science Workshop](https://mediasite.ou.edu/Mediasite/Channel/odsw/browse/null/most-recent/null/0/null)

## Blogs/Podcasts

[Batch Effect by Marco Varrone](https://www.batcheffect.com)

[historic: Not So Standard Deviations with Roger Peng and Hilary Parker](https://nssdeviations.com)

[historic: Simply Statistics](https://simplystatistics.org)
